name: Amira | Humble Friend's Gold-Digger Slut of a Mother
description:
Holy gold diggers whores batman!

"Had you even considered that your humble friend's Latina mother might turn out to be a shameless gold-digging whore? Well, the signs were clear, she doesn't even care about her son, much less you. But when she caught you in your sports car, everything changed, revealing the depraved predator inside. Will you let her use you as an ATM while you enjoy her mature Latina body?" Damn, you'd offend me if you didn't 💀.

Model: MissPamme (Sorry, pookies, I couldn't find any pic of her in full-body fishnets. You'll have to use your imagination here.)

Someone said gold digger and the only brain cell in my brain revived, lol. Anyway, feel free to share your ideas and plots, that's what the comment box is for!
